subcodes.first_line: This is the Kawthar of eternity which We have, in truth, made manifest and sent forth in the form of a Tablet, and dispatched unto thee that thou mayest be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کوثر البقا قد اظهرناه بالحق و بعثناه علی هیکل اللوح و ارسلناه الیک لتکون
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @courtesy; culture [adab]
